gpus: AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT (Navi 48, gfx1201, 16 GB)
AMD Radeon RX 9060 XT (Navi 44, gfx1200, 16 GB)

compute_time.methodology: Parsed every 'classified N emails in Xs' line in dry-run.console.log (covers 2026-05-09 to 2026-05-13) for 10,946 batches across 205,926 emails. The 4 worker threads serialize on a single GPU via Ollama, so per-worker batch durations include queue-wait — dividing by concurrency=4 gives actual GPU compute time. Post-May-13 sessions were not tee'd to console; their compute is extrapolated at 0.75 GPU-seconds per email (matches late-stage live observed throughput).

per_worker_batch_duration_seconds.note: includes queue-wait while other workers' batches are being served
